medialive.channel.fmp4hlssettings.AudioR.Docs: List all the audio groups that are used with the video output stream. Input all the audio GROUP-IDs that are associated to the video, separate by ','.

medialive.channel.fmp4hlssettings.Nielse.Docs: If set to passthrough, Nielsen inaudible tones for media tracking will be detected in the input audio and an equivalent ID3 tag will be inserted in the output.

medialive.channel.fmp4hlssettings.TimedM.Docs: When set to passthrough, timed metadata is passed through from input to output.
